entities.girl: a girl watching from a bench

scenes.title: The Skatepark
scenes.background_prompt: A concrete skatepark with ramps, rails, a half-pipe, graffiti on the walls, and a bench along the fence. Sunny afternoon. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A concrete skatepark on a sunny afternoon. A boy of about thirteen in a black t-shirt, baggy jeans, and a backward red cap crouches on a skateboard, racing down a sloped ramp at full speed with his arms out for balance, knees deeply bent. The skateboard's wheels blur against the smooth concrete. A girl of similar age in a denim jacket sits on a wooden bench along the chain-link fence, legs crossed, watching the boy with an amused smile and sipping from a juice box. Graffiti art in bright blues and oranges covers the walls of the half-pipe behind the ramp. A few other skateboards lean against the fence unused. The sun casts long shadows across the concrete.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place boy on the skateboard, crouching and racing down a sloped ramp at full speed, arms out for balance, knees deeply bent. Place girl on the wooden bench along the fence, sitting with legs crossed, watching and sipping a juice box.
scenes.scene_description: In the bottom left foreground, green leafy plants with small yellow and white flowers and four-leaf clovers grow near a concrete wall decorated with colorful blue, green, and orange graffiti. To the right, a grey metal grind rail with four legs stands on the flat concrete ground. In the bottom right corner, more green plants with white flowers and clovers are visible. Behind the grind rail and to the left, there is a small, grey concrete wedge ramp. To the right of the center, a boy with brown hair, wearing a green and white striped t-shirt, brown shorts, black knee pads, and blue sneakers, is skateboarding on a curved wooden ramp. He is leaning forward with his left hand on the ramp's edge and his right arm extended behind him; his brown skateboard features a small sun logo and black wheels. Behind the skatepark area is a low concrete ledge, and further back, a chain-link fence spans the width of the image. On the left side, behind the fence, a girl with brown hair in a ponytail, wearing a yellow sweater, blue pants, and brown shoes, sits on a wooden bench with dark metal legs while drinking from a cup with a straw. The background consists of a grassy field with small flowers, several large, rounded green trees with brown trunks, and a pale blue sky filled with soft white clouds, all bathed in a warm, golden light.
